description:
Purpose: align production telemetry with standards-friendly backends.

Done when:
- local Jidoka traces and production telemetry share correlation fields
- observability docs remain standards-friendly and dependency-light

comments.text: Closed E8 observability standards. Local Jidoka traces now share stable correlation fields with production telemetry, Jidoka lifecycle events are sanitized before emission, foundation request/model/action events are projected into traces, no-provider integration smoke coverage exists, and README documents host-app exporter attachment without making it a beginner requirement.

title: V3 E8: Observability standards
